title: leontopodium lingianum
intro: Leontopodium lingianum, also known as Himalayan or Tibetan cotton rose, is a flowering plant native to the eastern Himalayas and southern China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Leontopodium lingianum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support immune function. Leontopodium lingianum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional medicine to create remedies for various ailments.
